title: Traffic Advisory & Street Closure Notice for Memorial Day Parade
summary: The Eastwood Neighborhood Association will host the Eastwood Memorial Day Parade on May 25, 2026, from 9:00-9:30 a.m., with street closures on James Street between Nichols Avenue and Grant Boulevard beginning at 8:30 a.m. This routine traffic advisory requires coordination between Parks & Recreation and Transportation/Public Works for street management and public notification.
department_refs: Department of Parks, Recreation and Youth Programs
processing_notes: Author field is unknown; attribution to Parks & Recreation inferred from URL structure and content
